top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh sworn in as Fed chair as Trump seeks interest rate cuts
top_signals.summary: Despite President Donald Trump's demands for lower interest rates, markets are betting the Fed will stay on hold through most, if not all, of 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh's real Fed 'regime change' may happen deep inside Wall Street's plumbing
top_signals.summary: Warsh could guide to a smaller role in day-to-day markets, while also setting clearer rules for how and when it should intervene.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: NATO will spend hundreds of billions of dollars on defense, says Rutte, as Trump pledges 5,000 American troops to top spender Poland
top_signals.summary: "I am pleased to announce that the United States will be sending an additional 5,000 Troops to Poland," Trump said on Truth Social on Thursday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Indonesia Plans to Beat Global Trading Giants at Their Own Game
top_signals.summary: For years, Indonesia’s raw materials have been ferried from remote mines and plantations to global markets by armies of traders who handle negotiations, loans and even cranes and river barges.
